# INTERSPEECH 2026 submission checklist (generated)

## Generated files
- PDF to upload (CMT, <=20MB): `paper/submission/interspeech2026_review.pdf`
- Supplementary (optional, <=100MB zip): `paper/submission/supplementary.zip`
- Title (paste into CMT): `paper/submission/cmt_title.txt`
- Abstract (ASCII-only, <=1000 chars; paste into CMT): `paper/submission/cmt_abstract.txt`
- Keywords / Index Terms: `paper/submission/cmt_keywords.txt`
- CMT helper: `paper/submission/cmt_packet.json`
- CMT helper: `paper/submission/cmt_packet.md`

## Paper metadata (from paper.json)
- stage: `review`
- paper_type: `regular`
- title: `EPGSpeller: Lexicon-Free Silent Spelling Recognition with Electropalatography`
- keywords: `silent speech interface, electropalatography, character-level decoding, text entry, auditability`
- abstract_chars: `990` (limit 1000)

## Important dates (AoE)
- Paper Submission Portal Opens: 17 January 2026
- Paper Submission Deadline: 25 February 2026
- Paper Update Deadline: 4 March 2026
- Rebuttal Period: 24 April – 1 May 2026
- Paper Acceptance Notification: 5 June 2026
- Camera-ready Paper Submission: 19 June 2026
- Tutorial Day: 27 September 2026
- Conference: 27 September – 1 October 2026

## CMT form reminders (manual)
- Enter ALL authors in CMT at initial submission (PDF must stay anonymous in review stage).
- Domain conflicts: list institution domains (semicolon-separated); do NOT list email providers (e.g., gmail.com).
- Select 1 primary area + up to 2 secondary areas.
- Toronto Paper Matching System authorization: choose agree/disagree.
- Supplementary material (optional): 1 zip <=100MB; anonymized; uploaded after initial submission via Author Console.
- Confirm: anonymous submission; anonymous links/repos; scientific reporting checklist; accessibility recommendation; generative AI use disclosure; compliance with policies; no-show policy; screening consent; co-author consent; all conflict domains collected; reviewer-volunteer email(s).
- Also set: preferred presentation format; student paper award; ORCID list; first author gender (optional).
